markdownRemark.html:
Awesome CakePHP

A curated list of amazingly awesome CakePHP 3.x+ plugins, resources and shiny things.

Plugins with the "" icon have CakePHP 4 compatible release too.

If you are looking for CakePHP 2.x resources please visit:

  • the CakePHP 2.x version of this awesome list
  • this wiki with a list of not-yet upgraded plugins

Additional lists you might find useful:

  • CakePHP Plugins
  • Awesome PHPstars27.4k
  • Awesome Awesomenessstars29.4k

For those wondering; this list differs from plugins.cakephp.org by supporting plugin subparts (instead of only the whole plugin/repo), more granular grouping and the primary focus on task specific functionality.

Table of Contents

  • Plugins
    • APM
    • Architecture
    • Asset Management
    • Auditing / Logging

    • Help
    • CakePHP Websites

    • CakePHP Tutorials
    • CakePHP Reading and Listening
    • CakePHP Internals Reading
  • Conferences
  • Contributing

Plugins

APM

Plugins for Application Performance Monitoring.

  • NewRelic plugin - A complete plugin that enables full New Relic integration for a CakePHP application, including CLI naming, exceptions sending, custom timings, etc.
  • NewRelic pluginstars6 - A simple plugin that enables just name transaction and browser timing using the New Relic PHP agent.

Architecture

  • Burzum/CakeServiceLayer pluginstars60 - Service layer and domain/business model implementation.

Asset Management

Tools for managing, compressing and minifying website assets.

  • AssetCompress pluginstars367 - A complete asset manager for CakePHP.
  • AssetMix pluginstars27 - Provides integration with Laravel Mix asset compilation.
  • Assets pluginstars3 - Dynamic and "on the fly" asset files.
  • Less pluginstars17 - Less parser plugin for CakePHP.
  • MinifyHtml pluginstars19 - Compress HTML output.

Auditing / Logging

Plugins for auditing and logging.

  • AuditStash pluginstars69 - Flexible and rock solid audit log tracking.
  • DatabaseLog pluginstars41 - Simple and stand-alone logging to database instead of files.
  • Muffin/Footprint pluginstars87 - Plugin to allow passing currently logged in user to model layer.
  • Version pluginstars52 - A plugin that facilitates versioned database entities.

Authentication and Authorization

Plugins and libraries for implementing authentication and authorization.

  • Acl pluginstars115 - Managing ACL as database approach.
  • ADmad/JwtAuth pluginstars158 - A plugin for authenticating using JSON Web Tokens.
  • ADmad/SocialAuth pluginstars45 - A plugin which allows you to authenticate using social providers like Facebook/Google/Twitter etc. using SocialConnect/authstars508 social sign on library.
  • Authentication pluginstars97 - Official CakePHP authentication middleware plugin.
  • Authorization pluginstars62 - Official CakePHP authorization stack.
  • CakeDC/NavAuth pluginstars9 - A plugin for authenticating against Navision® service using SOAP or OData services. It includes NTLM authentication and more.
  • CakeDC/Users pluginstars504 - Complete user management (admin panel, remember me, etc), Social login (FB, Twitter, LinkedIn, Google, Instagram), RBAC, API and more.
  • CookieAuth pluginstars18 - A simple Cake 3 plugin to automatically authenticate users with Cookies.
  • HierAuth pluginstars6 - A CakePHP plugin for hierarchical, role based, simple authorization.
  • Muffin/OAuth2 pluginstars25 - OAuth2 authentication using the league/oauth2-client.
  • Muffin/Tokenize pluginstars12 - Event driven behavior for easily generating single-use security tokens.
  • MultiTenant pluginstars36 - Easily build SaaS enabled web applications.
  • TinyAuth pluginstars123 - Authentication and role based (single/multi) authorization as very light-weight approach.
  • Tools:Passwordablestars331 - Containing Passwordable behavior for a DRY approach on password hashing.
  • TwoFactorAuth pluginstars33 - Allows two factor authentication using Google Authenticator or similar app to generate one-time codes. Based on RobThree/TwoFactorAuthstars882 library.
  • UserPermissions pluginstars18 - Allow groups of users or single users to view a specific page.

Caching

Plugins for caching data.

  • Cache pluginstars31 - For caching views (HTML, CSV, JSON, XML, ...) as static cache files.

Code Analysis

Plugins for analysing, parsing and manipulation codebases.

  • CakeDC/PHPStanstars16 - A PHPStan extension to resolve CakePHP magic around getter return types for the static analyzer.
  • IdeHelper pluginstars162 - Helps to make IDE support better by adding annotations to your existing code similar to what baking does to new code.
  • TestHelper pluginstars7 - Provides testing enhancements and TDD support as browser backend.

Debugging

Plugins for debugging and local development.

  • Airbrake pluginstars3 A plugin to seamlessly integrate Airbrake with CakePHP for errors and exceptions.
  • AssociationsDebugger pluginstars6 - A plugin that draws your model associations as diagram.
  • CakephpWhoops pluginstars13 - PHP errors and exceptions for cool kids with filp/whoopsstars12.8k.
  • DebugKit pluginstars856 - The de-facto standard for debugging.
  • ErrorEmail pluginstars16 - A plugin to email exception/error information to your dev team.
  • Execution orderstars21 - A demo app to display the execution order of files, methods and callbacks.
  • Psa/FixtureCheck pluginstars2 - A plugin to help detect mismatches in live DB and fixtures in order to make fixture based tests more reliable and deployments safer.
  • Sentry pluginstars35 A plugin to seamlessly integrate Sentry with CakePHP for errors and exceptions.
  • Setup pluginstars35 - A lightweight setup plugin containing debugging and maintenance tools.

Dependency Injection

Plugins that implement the dependency injection design pattern.

  • PimpleDi pluginstars13 Allows dependency injection based on Pimple library.
  • PipingBag pluginstars35 - Dependency injection container plugin that adds the ability to configure object instances and their dependencies before they are used, and to store them into a container class for easy access.

E-commerce

Plugins and applications for taking payments and building online e-commerce stores.

  • PaypalWPP pluginstars2 - For communicating with Paypal Web Payments Pro for transactions and information about your account.

Email

Plugins for sending and parsing email.

  • Elastic Email pluginstars4 - Email transport plugin for sending email via Elastic Email API.
  • EmailQueue pluginstars58 - Email queue plugin with a preview and sender shell.
  • Gourmet/Email pluginstars17 - Email helper, layout and more.
  • Mailgun pluginstars23 - Email transport plugin for sending email via Mailgun.
  • SendGrid pluginstars5 - Email transport plugin for sending email via SendGrid API.

Environment

Plugins for environment.

  • Environments pluginstars47 - Plugin to handle environments.
  • Gourmet/Aroma pluginstars14 - Database based configuration.
  • Settings pluginstars25 - A plugin to manage your settings via your database.

File Manipulation

Plugins for file manipulation.

  • FileStorage pluginstars203 - Abstract file storage and upload plugin.
  • FlyPie pluginstars35 - Abstract filesystem access using Flysystem.
  • Image pluginstars20 - Image behavior that works much like Cake's built in TranslateBehavior.
  • Josbeir/Filesystem pluginstars18 - Abstract Flysystem + file entity based upload plugin.
  • Josegonzalez/Upload pluginstars557 - A customisable plugin that uses Flysystem to write to multiple backends (Dropbox, FTP, S3, Local, etc.).
  • Proffer pluginstars121 - A customisable upload plugin with thumbnail generation.
  • Xety/Cake3Upload pluginstars25 - A little plugin to upload file.

Filtering and Validation

Plugins for filtering and validating data.

  • Gourmet/Filters pluginstars10 - Extra dispatcher filters (maintenance, robots, ip, etc).
  • Gourmet/Validation pluginstars4 - Extra validation providers (Respect, IsoCodes, etc.) and rules.
  • HtmlPurifier pluginstars43 - Purifier Plugin that features a trait, behavior and helper to allow you to get sanitization and filtering where you need it. You can configure multiple sets of filter rules as well.
  • HtmlPurifier pluginstars12 - Purifier Plugin Behavior that cleanses data before it is marshaled into the entity and/or before saving.

Geolocation

Plugins for geocoding addresses and working with latitudes and longitudes.

  • Geo pluginstars46 - Containing Geocoder behavior and GoogleMaps helper.

HTTP

Plugins for HTTP and client abstraction

  • Http/Adapter/Cake librarystars3 - Adapter for HTTPlugstars2.4k HTTP client abstraction.

I18n

Plugins for I18n (Internationalization) and L10n (Localization).

  • ADmad/I18n pluginstars40 - A plugin with I18n related tools.
  • Cake/Localized pluginstars213 - Localized validation and ready-to-use translation PO files.
  • ShadowTranslate pluginstars42 - A plugin with shadow table based replacement for core's Translate behavior.
  • Transifex pluginstars14 - Managing i18n PO files and translations via Transifex API.
  • Translate pluginstars18 - Manage translations of your static content the easy way via web backend, incl. import from POT files, auto-suggest and auto-translate via API.
  • Translation pluginstars4 - Extract pot files, translate string (manually, google, community), export translations to pot files.

Imagery

Plugins for manipulating images.

  • ADmad/Glide pluginstars34 - A plugin for using Glide image manipulation library.
  • HtmlToImageView pluginstars1 - Render HTML view as image (jpg or png) using wkhtmltoimage.
  • Imagine pluginstars139 - An image manipulation plugin and wrapper around Imaginestars4.3k.
  • Thumber pluginstars7 - A plugin to create thumbnails using intervention/imagestars12.9k.

Libs

Useful libraries or tools that don't fit in any of the other categories.

  • Capcakestars114 - Deploy CakePHP applications using Capistrano.
  • Chronosstars1.3k - A simple standalone DateTime API extension (successor of Carbon).
  • Composer Installersstars1.4k - A multi framework Composer library installer.
  • Composer/Packagist - A package and dependency manager.
  • Graphvizstars64 - A Graphviz library.
  • Rocketeerstars2.7k - PHP task runner and deployment package.
  • makallio85/YamlRoute pluginstars6 - Configure routes with simple YAML files.

Markup

Plugins for working with markup.

  • Gourmet/CommonMark pluginstars10 - Adds CommonMark Markdown parsing.
  • Markup pluginstars2 - Allows to use PHP or JS based syntax highlighting.

Migration

Plugins and resources around migration and upgrading.

  • Migrations pluginstars121 - (DB) Migration plugin.
  • Upgrade appstars96 - Official upgrade app for 2.x=>3.x and 3.x=>4.x.
  • Upgrade app (extended)stars20 - An extended upgrade app for 2.x=>3.x, between 3.x and some 4.x snippets.
  • Upgrade/Migration Guide - Official migration guide.

Miscellaneous

Misc plugins and libraries.

  • ActionsClass pluginstars13 - Gives you the ability to manage your Controller actions as single classes.
  • Ajax pluginstars55 - A plugin to ease handling AJAX requests.
  • CakeAdmin pluginstars29 - A non-stable user management plugin with a built-in admin area.
  • CakeDC/Enum pluginstars27 - A plugin to add enumeration list support to your app.
  • CakeDto pluginstars24 - Quickly generate useful data transfer objects for your app (mutable/immutable), replacing messy arrays and leveraging your IDE through typehinting and autocomplete.
  • CakeImpersonate pluginstars7 - A component that stores the current authentication session and creates new session for impersonating Users. User can revert back to original authentication sessions without the need to re-login.
  • CakeMiddlewaresstars4 - A collection of Cakephp Middlewares.
  • Calendar pluginstars15 - For generating basic calendars. Includes IcalView for ICS calendar file generation.
  • Comments pluginstars8 - A fully customizable Comments plugin.
  • CurrencyConverter pluginstars7 - A plugin to convert currency into another one.
  • Dashboard pluginstars18 - Build beautiful dashboards for your cakes.
  • DatabaseBackup pluginstars14 - A plugin to export, import and manage database backups.
  • Feedback pluginstars5 - Allow visitors to send quick and easy feedback incl. a screenshot via sidebar form.
  • Flash pluginstars11 - More powerful flash messages for your application.
  • OPCache Preloaderstars8 - An OPCache Preloader for CakePHP 4.x applications.
  • OrcaServices/Heartbeat pluginstars4 - Monitor the hearbeat of your application (e.g. whether the database is available and up-to-date).
  • Inertia pluginstars29 - Server side adapter for Inertia.js.
  • Interval pluginstars1 - Converts seconds to human readable string (string to seconds), uses business hours (1 week = 5 days, 1 day = 8 hours).
  • LinkScanner pluginstars2 - A plugin for recursively scanning links.
  • Robotusers/Tactician pluginstars8 - Tools for Tactician command bus integration.
  • Setup:Maintenance - Maintenance shell to go into maintenance mode for all requests with optional IP whitelisting.
  • Shim pluginstars37 - A plugin containing useful shims and improvements as basis for your application.
  • TokenVerify pluginstars9 - Easily issue tokens that can be used for mail authentication.
  • Tools pluginstars331 - Containing lots of useful libs, helpers, behaviors, components, shells and more.
  • UserTools pluginstars42 - User tools for login, registration, password reset and more. Works out of the box CRUD like and is highly configurable.
  • Utils pluginstars31 - Containing useful components (Authorizer, Menu) and behaviors (WhoDidIt, Uploadable, Metas, Stateable).
  • Wrench pluginstars27 - Maintenance Mode plugin. Easily extensible and customizable.
  • Yaml pluginstars11 - For using YAML config files instead of PHP arrays.

Navigation

Tools for building navigation structures.

  • Icings/Menu pluginstars11 - A KnpMenustars1.3k seasoned menu plugin for CakePHP.

NoSQL

Plugins for working with "NoSQL" backends.

  • Monga pluginstars18 - Provides access to MongoDB datasource using thephpleague/monga.

Notifications

Plugins for working with notification software.

  • ker0x/CakeGcm pluginstars8 - A plugin to send downstream messages to an Android or iOS device through Google Cloud Messaging.
  • Notifier pluginstars61 - A plugin that makes creating and reading notifications easy.
  • ker0x/Push pluginstars18 - A plugin to send push notifications through services like Firebase Cloud Messaging.

ORM / Database / Datamapping

Plugins that implement object-relational mapping or data-mapping techniques.

  • ADmad/Sequence pluginstars41 - Behavior for maintaining ordered list of records.
  • CakeDecimal pluginstars3 - A value object approach on handling decimals.
  • Duplicatable pluginstars44 - Behavior for duplicating entities including related data.
  • Fetchable pluginstars0 - Behavior for fetching entities from cache / memory.
  • Lampager/Cake pluginstars5 - Rapid pagination without using OFFSET.
  • JeremyHarris/LazyLoad pluginstars62 - An association lazy loader for entities.
  • Lqdt/OrmJson pluginstars12 - Behavior and Trait for selecting, finding, getting and setting properties and values inside JSON type fields through CakePHP ORM.
  • Money pluginstars6 - Money data type for CakePHP entities using sebastianbergmann/moneystars737.
  • Muffin/Orderly pluginstars21 - Allows setting default order for your tables.
  • Muffin/Sti pluginstars5 - Single Table Inheritance for CakePHP.
  • Muffin/Trash pluginstars76 - Soft-delete behavior for CakePHP.
  • PersistRelatedData pluginstars12 - Behavior for persisting selected fields of related models.
  • Robotusers/Excel pluginstars22 - ORM wrapper for PHPExcel.
  • Robotusers/TableInheritance pluginstars5 - Singe Table Inheritance (STI) plugin.
  • RowLocker pluginstars19 - Exclusive locks for rows in your tables.
  • Serializeable Data Types pluginstars2 - Serialize DB content as JSON or using phps serializing functions.
  • Muffin/Webservices ORM pluginstars84 - An ORM like interface for webservices.
  • Connehito/CakephpMasterReplica pluginstars12 - Switch master/replica database connections.
  • Itosho/EasyQuery pluginstars26 - Behavior for easily generating some complicated queries like (bulk) insert/upsert etc.
  • Icings/Partitionable pluginstars10 - Partitionable associations allowing for basic limiting per group.

PDF

Plugins and software for working with PDF files.

  • CakePdf pluginstars373 - A plugin around PDF generation.

Queue

Plugins for working with event and task queues.

  • CakeResque pluginstars160 - A plugin for Resque, a library for creating background jobs.
  • CakeQueuesadilla pluginstars33 - A plugin that provides queueing integration with a variety of backends (BeanstalkD, MySQL, Redis, etc.).
  • Gearman pluginstars13 - A plugin for offloading CakePHP tasks to a Gearman Job Server.
  • Queue pluginstars282 - A minimal and dependency-free queue solution.

REST and API

Plugins and web tools for developing REST-ful APIs.

  • Alt3/Swagger pluginstars61 - Swagger 2.0 documentation for your CakePHP APIs using swagger-php and swagger-ui.
  • Alt3/ValidationExposer pluginstars9 - Easily expose your application's validation rules.
  • ApiPagination pluginstars40 - Injects pagination information from CakePHP's Paginator into serialized JsonView and XmlView responses.
  • CakeDC/Api pluginstars59 - All-in-one solution to provide a complete API. It includes versioning, renderers, CRUD, authentication, extensions (paginate, filter, HATEOAS), and much more.
  • Cors pluginstars43 - Activate CORS with Middleware.
  • Cors pluginstars19 - A lightweight plugin for adding CORS headers to specified endpoints.
  • CrudJsonApi pluginstars47 - Crud listener for building JSON API compliant APIs.
  • FractalTransformerView pluginstars15 - A plugin which allows using Fractal transformers for your API output.
  • MixerApi - Streamline development of modern RESTful APIs for your teams CakePHP project.
  • SwaggerBake pluginstars48 - This plugin automatically builds OpenAPI from your existing models and routes for display in Swagger and Redoc.

Search

Plugins and software for indexing and performing search queries on data.

  • Cake/ElasticSearch pluginstars85 - Alternative ORM using Elasticsearch as its backend.
  • PlumSearch pluginstars20 - Search plugin implements custom, flexible and extendable search strategies. Implements PRG pattern.
  • Search pluginstars155 - Provides easy searching/filtering for paginated views using PRG pattern.
  • SphinxSearch pluginstars3 - Basic behaviour implementation for querying SphinxSearch indexes.
  • Tags pluginstars12 - For tagging and finding tagged records.

Security

Plugins and information around security, preventing vulnerabilities and protection against XSS and alike.

  • Bruteforcestars3 - Simple way to add Brute Force Protection to your installation without involving database.
  • BryanCrowe/EncryptedTypestars7 - Simple solution that enables Encrypted data types to be stored in the database.
  • Captcha pluginstars6 - Simple, unobstrusive and extendable captcha solution providing by default an image based math captcha.
  • CipherBehavior pluginstars11 - Cipher your entities data with this behavior. Encryption is done at PHP level using CakePHP Security class.
  • Expose pluginstars8 - Expose entities through additional UUIDs instead of their AIID primary keys to obfuscate those IDs and data associated with these numerically ordered values.
  • Muffin/Obfuscate pluginstars34 - Primary key obfuscation/shortening using UUIDs, HashIds, Optimus, Tiny and/or custom obfuscation strategies.
  • Muffin/Throttle pluginstars59 - A plugin for rate limiting (API) requests.
  • Recaptcha pluginstars20 - Simple, lightweight Google Recaptcha v2.
  • Recaptcha Mailhide pluginstars1 - A plugin that allows you to hide email addresses using reCAPTCHA.
  • StopSpam pluginstars1 - A plugin that allows you to check if a username, email address or IP address has been reported as a spammer.

SEO

Search Engine Optimization.

  • Muffin/Slug pluginstars32 - A plugin for generating slugs and finding records by slug. Uses a pluggable architecture which allows using your own slug generator class.
  • Seo pluginstars7 - Auto-creates and manages your SEO tags.
  • Sluggable pluginstars6 - A simple Cake3 plugin to slug fields and find records by slug.
  • Tools:Sluggedstars331 - Containing Slugged behavior to auto-generate URL-compatible slugs from titles.

Skeleton

Plugins and repositories around app skeletons.

  • App templatestars337 - An empty CakePHP project for use with composer.
  • Crud pluginstars352 - CakePHP Application development on steroids - rapid prototyping / scaffolding & production ready code.
  • MixerApi/Bakestars3 - Bake theme for generating RESTful controllers.
  • Plugin Skeletonstars9 - A skeleton example to create a Cake3 plugin.

Social

Plugins around social features.

  • CakeDC/Forum pluginstars23 - Forum plugin including categories, threads and replies, reporting messages, moderators, admin interface and more.
  • Ratings pluginstars8 - Allows users to rate records and displays ratings.
  • SocialShare pluginstars30 - Link generator for sharing content on social networks.

Templating

Plugins for templating and lexing.

  • Address pluginstars0 - An address helper that outputs a marked up address.
  • Bake pluginstars93 - Provides code generation functionality.
  • Bootstrap pluginstars28 - A Bootstrap 3 plugin with support for LESS.
  • BootstrapUI pluginstars318 - Bootstrap 3 integration.
  • CakeExcel pluginstars22 - An Excel view to generate XLSX files.
  • Chocolate pluginstars6 - Front-End framework FormHelper extensions.
  • CommonMark pluginstars10 - Adds CommonMark (markdown) support to models and views.
  • CsvView pluginstars175 - A view class to easily generate CSV.
  • Datalist pluginstars6 - Support for HTML5 datalist element with the possibility to create new entries into associated models.
  • Feed pluginstars13 - Containing an RssView class to easily generate (complex) RSS feeds.
  • InlineCss pluginstars8 - A plugin to convert HTML style blocks to inline CSS on a View template (intended for use with email templates).
  • JadeView pluginstars0 - Jade template engine plugin.
  • Liquid pluginstars3 - A plugin to use the Liquid templating language for views.
  • Meta pluginstars7 - Makes handling meta tags and SEO relevant HTML markup DRY and easy.
  • SocialMeta pluginstars23 - Adds support for Facebook's OpenGraph and Twitter's Card meta tags.
  • TwigView pluginstars11 - A plugin to use the Twig Templating Language for views.
  • VideoEmbed pluginstars4 - Helper for embedding YouTube, Vimeo and Dailymotion videos.

Testing

Plugins/Tools for testing codebases and generating test data.

  • CakePHP Codeception modulestars46 - The official CakePHP integration with Codeception.
  • CakePHP CodeSniffer rulesstars229 - The official CakePHP CS rules.
  • CakephpFixtureFactories pluginstars69 - Create your fixtures dynamically on a test basis, accelerate the writing and maintainance of your tests.
  • Faker pluginstars17 - Fakerstars26.6k support for CakePHP fixtures.
  • Fixtures pluginstars2 - Fixtures plugin to read existing fixtures and create table/insert data for quick start with app.
  • FriendsOfCake/Fixturize pluginstars23 - More efficient inserting fixtures when running test suites by decreasing amount of inserts (mysql only).
  • Gourmet/Muffin pluginstars2 - FactoryMuffinstars527 support for CakePHP fixture records.

Third Party APIs

Plugins for accessing third party APIs.

  • CakeTmdb pluginstars4 - The Movie Database (TMDB) API integration.
  • CloudflareDeploy Pluginstars1 - Useful console commands for deploying CakePHP apps using Cloudflare.
  • GitHub pluginstars8 - Allows access to the GitHub REST APIs using the Webservicestars84 ORM.
  • Jira pluginstars2 - Provides a helper to allow access to Jira's REST API using lesstif/php-jira-rest-clientstars473 as the Vendor. Currently read-only access.
  • Ratchet pluginstars51 - Brings the Ratchet websocket package to CakePHP.
  • Salesforce pluginstars7 - Allows use of CakePHP's ORM to Query and Interact with Salesforce Enterprise Instances.
  • Twitter pluginstars18 - Allows access to the Twitter REST and streaming APIs using the Webservicestars84 ORM.

Software

Software for creating a development environment.

Development Environment

Software and tools for creating a sandboxed development environment.

  • CakePHP.gitignore - The .gitignore file proposals.
  • CakePHP Dockerstars19 - A cakephp/app template for docker and kubernetes setup.
  • CakePHP Vagrant Setupstars5 - Tool for spinning up multiple CakePHP 3.x Vanilla Dev Environments.
  • Devilbox - A docker development environment for (CakePHP) apps to be auto-setup including a lot of tools.
  • Dockerstars31 - CakePHP in a docker container environment.
  • Galley - A small Docker dev environment for CakePHP development which includes a simple command line utility.
  • Mixerstars45 - A plugin to discover and manage CakePHP plugins.
  • NetBeansstars45 - This package provides support for CakePHP in NetBeans 8.1+.
  • Ovenstars138 - Setup your favorite framework with 1 file and 1 click.
  • PhpStorm pluginstars7 - CakePHP auto-completion support for console commands in PhpStorm IDE.
  • Puppet - A server automation framework and application.
  • Vagrant - A portable development environment utility.

IDE specific compatibility information and tips can be found here.

Web Applications

CMS and applications built on CakePHP

  • CakeBlogstars6 - Open source blog software.
  • Croogo - CMS software
  • QuickApps-CMSstars162 - Open source content management system.

Demo

Web-based (demo) applications and tools.

  • BlogMVCstars7 - A simple Blog example with CakePHP based on BlogMVC Projectstars214.
  • Bookmarkrstars16 A bookmarking application built with the CRUD plugin.
  • CakeFest - Demo application around the annual CakePHP Conference "CakeFest".
  • Croogo 3.x - Croogo 3.x demo
  • RealWorldstars105 - Example CakePHP codebase containing real world examples (CRUD, auth, advanced patterns and more) that adheres to the RealWorldstars69.4k spec and API.
  • Sandbox - A sandbox CakePHP application with lots of demos and plugin showcasings.
  • Query Examplesstars56 Advanced query building examples.
  • Xetastars55 - A resource to help people starting with CakePHP.
  • Vue.js Demo Appstars46 - A CakePHP + VueJS single page application skeleton.

Resources

Various resources, such as books, websites and articles, for improving your CakePHP development skills and knowledge.

Help

Where to get help.

  • CakePHP-FR.org - The french community website.
  • Official CakePHP Forum - This is for generic questions and alike.
  • IRC Channel - Live chat/discussion with other devs and core devs.
  • stackoverflow.com/questions/tagged/cakephp - This is for specific questions, ideally along with some example code.

CakePHP Websites

Useful and current CakePHP-related websites and blogs.

  • CakeDC - Articles around CakePHP.
  • dereuromark.de - An extensive CakePHP core dev blog.
  • jedistirfry.co.uk - A CakePHP related dev blog.
  • josediazgonzalez.com - A mainly CakePHP related core dev blog.
  • mark-story.com - CakePHP lead dev blog.
  • waltherlalk.com - A CakePHP related core dev blog.

CakePHP Books and Articles

Fantastic CakePHP-related (e)books and other reading material.

CakePHP Videos

Fantastic CakePHP-related videos.

  • CakePHP - Channel about CakePHP videos.

CakePHP Tutorials

Must-do tutorials.

  • Official Blog tutorial

CakePHP Reading and Listening

Documentation and CakePHP-related reading and listening materials.

  • CakePHP Cookbook(!) - The official CakePHP documentation.

CakePHP Internals Reading

Reading materials related to the CakePHP internals and decisions.

  • Top 10 (and more) core contributors - Give 'em a hand.

Conferences

Official

International conference.

  • cakefest.org - Annual CakePHP Conference.

MeetUps

Regional meet-ups.

  • CakePHP-DE - MeetUps in Germany.

Contributing

Please see CONTRIBUTING for details.

Credits

awesome-cakephp has been created by dereuromark and is currently maintained by him and the FriendsOfCake group. Thank you to all contributors, too.
